item.title: Pelican 2018
item.description: Updates to Pelican and this blog. This is a summary of theme changes, a list of my favorite plugins, and a summary of plugins that I updated to improve this website. It also contains a short discussion of the pelican-plugins repository and its potential consequences for the lacking popularity of individual plugins.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: pelican-jsmath Plugin
item.description: An \(\alpha\omega\epsilon s \sigma m \epsilon\) Pelican plugin to render math in JavaScript libraries like KaTeX. This plugin makes sure that equations are preserved in the Markdown and Restructured Text parsers and get reproduced properly in HTML for a JavaScript renderer to process.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: Stream Processing in pysparkling
item.description: pysparkling now supports stream processing with discrete streams, called DStream. This post shows a simple example that uses this new API.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: Decouple
item.description: Decoupling theoretical uncertainties from measurements of the Higgs boson.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: Databench v0.4
item.description: New release of Databench that switches the backend from Flask to Tornado, fully supports Python 2 and 3, transpiles ES6 to legacy JavaScript and runs unit tests and coverage on every commit.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: word2vec on Databricks
item.description: Running word2vec on Databricks. A full example of using gensim and distributed maps with Spark to run this Python analysis on Databricks.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: Parallel Processing with pysparkling
item.description: Benchmarks for the latest parallel features in pysparkling. It shows good scaling for processing with multiple CPU cores. The example contains only a simple computation which shows that hyperthreading is not very effective in this case.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: pysparkling
item.description: A pure Python implementation of Apache Spark’s RDD interfaces. pysparkling does not depend on Java and has a small execution overhead. It can be a fast test runner for Spark applications.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: Wildcardians on Twitter
item.description: A short project to visualize the social Twitter graph of people at Wildcard. The backend is particularly efficient in the number of API calls. The visualization is interactive in d3.js.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: Collaborative Statistical Modeling
item.description: A poster about the collaborative statistical modeling work that Kyle Cranmer and I did and that was used to discover the Higgs boson. We presented this at the opening of the Center for Data Science at NYU.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: PhD Thesis
item.description: Finished my PhD thesis: Higgs Boson Discovery and First Property Measurements using the ATLAS Detector. It summarizes my work over a few years on Higgs Physics with ATLAS and on collaborative statistical modeling.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: Databench
item.description: Databench is a data analysis tool using Flask, Socket.IO and d3.js with optional parallelization with Redis Queue and visualization with mpld3.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: dvds-js version 0.1.0
item.description: Distributed Versioned Data Structures in JavaScript. Like git in js.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: Vimeo liquid tag for Pelican
item.description: Extend liquid tags plugin for Pelican to include a Vimeo tag.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: Chasing the Higgs - New York Times
item.description: My part of the Higgs discovery story in the New York Times.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: A Nobel Prize Party: Cheese, Bubbles, and a Boson - The New Yorker
item.description: I got mentioned in the New Yorker article: A Nobel Prize Party: Cheese, Bubbles, and a Boson.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss

item.title: My robot Number4 in the Leipziger Volkszeitung
item.description: Student from Brandis (me) teaches robot how to walk.
item.dc:creator: Sven Kreiss
